title: Radical Technologies
author: Adam Greenfield
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A simple smartphone outline (hairline). The phone's screen is filled with a tangled mess of red lines — a network of dependencies. The device is the technology, the lines are the entanglement. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Phone outline -->
    <rect x="-180" y="-360" width="360" height="720" rx="40" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- Speaker line at top -->
    <line x1="-40" y1="-330" x2="40" y2="-330" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Home indicator at bottom -->
    <line x1="-40" y1="320" x2="40" y2="320" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- Screen area -->
    <rect x="-160" y="-300" width="320" height="600" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- Red network of tangled lines -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none">
      <path d="M -120 -260 Q 80 -200 -100 -100 Q 80 -40 -120 40 Q 80 100 -100 200 Q 40 260 -80 280"/>
      <path d="M 100 -240 Q -80 -180 120 -80 Q -80 -20 100 60 Q -80 140 100 220"/>
      <path d="M -80 -280 Q 0 -160 -100 -60 Q 0 40 -100 140 Q 0 240 -80 280"/>
      <path d="M 80 -240 Q 0 -100 100 0 Q 0 100 100 200 Q 0 240 80 280"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Network nodes (small red dots at intersections) -->
    <g fill="#fc1c46">
      <circle cx="-100" cy="-200" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="80" cy="-120" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="80" cy="80" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="-100" cy="180" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="60" cy="240" r="3"/>
    </g>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">THE NETWORK ENTANGLES · THE DESIGN HOLDS</text>
</svg>
rationale: A simple hairline smartphone outline. Inside the screen, four red curves cross and recur in a tangled network, with small red dots at the inflection points. The device is the technology, the red lines are the dependencies, the tangle is the radical entanglement. Title 320px mixed case, two lines, weight 300.
